context: Tests whether the agent uses crypto.randomBytes with the unambiguous character set for code generation, handles bulk collisions via ON CONFLICT, sets correct single-use limits, and implements atomic optimistic-locking redemption as specified in the coupon-management skill.

checklist.name: Uses crypto.randomBytes
checklist.description: generateCouponCode uses Node's built-in crypto.randomBytes (not Math.random or uuid) to generate the random portion

checklist.name: Unambiguous character set
checklist.description: The character set used for code generation omits ambiguous characters: does NOT include '0', 'O', '1', or 'I'

checklist.name: Code format: prefix-random
checklist.description: Generated codes follow the format '${prefix}-${randomChars}' (a prefix, a hyphen, then the random segment)

checklist.name: Batch size 500
checklist.description: bulkGenerateCoupons processes codes in batches — batch size is 500 (or a constant named to that effect)

checklist.name: Conflict-safe insert
checklist.description: bulkGenerateCoupons uses an insert strategy equivalent to ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING / onConflict: 'ignore' to silently skip collisions

checklist.name: Generates until target quantity
checklist.description: bulkGenerateCoupons continues looping until the actual number of successfully inserted codes reaches the requested quantity

checklist.name: usage_limit: 1 on bulk codes
checklist.description: Each bulk-generated code is inserted with usage_limit set to 1

checklist.name: per_customer_limit: 1 on bulk codes
checklist.description: Each bulk-generated code is inserted with per_customer_limit set to 1

checklist.name: Atomic UPDATE with WHERE guard
checklist.description: redeemCoupon uses an UPDATE ... SET usage_count = usage_count + 1 WHERE ... AND (usage_limit IS NULL OR usage_count < usage_limit) pattern

checklist.name: rowCount race-condition check
checklist.description: redeemCoupon checks the UPDATE row count and throws an error (e.g. COUPON_EXHAUSTED) when zero rows were updated

checklist.name: Transaction parameter
checklist.description: redeemCoupon accepts a transaction object/parameter rather than opening its own connection, enabling it to run inside the order creation transaction
